records.ety: [Gr. di`s- twice; akin to <?/ two, L. bis twice. See Two, and cf. Bi-, Dia-. The L. pref. dis- sometimes assumes the form di-. See Dis-.]

defs: A prefix, signifying twofold, double, twice
denoting two atoms, radicals, groups, or equivalents, as the case may be. See Bi-, 2.

records.ety: [Gr. dia` through; orig., dividing into two parts; akin to <?/ two. See Two, and cf. 1st Di-.]

defs: A prefix denoting through; also, between, apart, asunder, across. Before a vowel dia- becomes di-; as, diactinic; dielectric, etc.
